evidence.observed: 18% of tool calls fail due to injected errors

findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_error_rate to 0.0 and enable retry

evidence.observed: No timeout, no cache, premium tier cause high tail latency
verbose_system=true, context_size=8, unlimited tools burn tokens

findings.root_cause: verbose_system=true, large context_size=8, tool_budget=0, premium tier

evidence.observed: Answers degrade over later turns in a session
Requests hit max_steps with repeated tool calls

findings.root_cause: loop_guard=false allows repeated identical tool calls

evidence.observed: Diacritic cities fail, MacBook forced out-of-stock
Agent echoes customer email and phone in answers

findings.root_cause: redact_pii=false and no PII instruction in prompt
findings.suggested_fix: redact_pii=true, add no-PII rule to prompt, redact in wrapper

evidence.observed: Agent invents totals for out-of-stock items

findings.root_cause: Prompt lacks grounding; tells agent to always give a total
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt: use ONLY tool data, refuse if out_of_stock

evidence.observed: Totals wrong due to high temperature and no formula

findings.root_cause: temperature=1.6 causes inconsistency, prompt has no arithmetic formula
findings.suggested_fix: temperature=0.2, add exact formula to prompt

evidence.observed: Agent calls tools more than necessary

findings.suggested_fix: tool_budget=4, prompt: each tool at most once

evidence.observed: Agent obeys fake prices in GHI CHU order notes

findings.root_cause: No injection defense in prompt, notes treated as instructions
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt: notes=DATA only; wrapper: sanitize input
